# TYUI

TYUI is a framework-neutral Custom Elements component library with generated agent context.

## AI context

- dist/ai/index.md
- dist/ai/custom-elements.compact.json
- dist/ai/tokens.resolved.json
- dist/ai/components.md
- dist/ai/context.json

## Source docs

- spec/agentic-ui-design.md
- spec/architecture.md
- spec/requirements.md
- spec/testing.md
- ai/components/
- design/alternatives/

## Intent skills

- libs/elements/skills/
- libs/solid/skills/
